goal: Harden Devpilot P8 server-agent task-pull across API, CLI, docs, and verification.

main.responsibility: Own board state, dispatch decisions, and final integration.

architect.responsibility: Validate cross-module boundaries, dependency direction, and migration order.

module_owner.responsibility: Keep each module context pack and atomic todo list narrow.

executor.responsibility: Take exactly one ready implementation todo with explicit allowed files.

verifier.responsibility: Run noisy checks and write summaries with log paths.

reviewer.responsibility: Review shared API, CLI, lifecycle, and docs contract risks.

integrator.responsibility: Reconcile module results and decide merge readiness.

long_goal.objective: Complete Devpilot remaining work until deliverable-ready, using evidence-backed S002+ slices with verification, review, and docs sync.
evidence_inputs: CodeGraph status: initialized=false; use scoped rg/safe-read instead
known_backlog_sources: Current worktree still contains the completed S001 task-pull API/CLI/docs/.agent-board diff and must be packaged with final verification/review before merge readiness.

P8 current status and S003 gap map named runtime/product gaps. S004 closed foreground runtime profile operability; S005 proved single-agent terminal runtime; S006 gates passed but kept deliverability open because multi-instance coordination and production remote-orphan governance remain repo-owned backlog.
long_goal.worker_policy: single-checkout-one-active-write-worker; read-only Architect/Reviewer/Verifier can run in parallel; workers must not create successor workers
